book.title: Shama'il Muhammadiyah
book.author: Imam Tirmidhi
book.introduction: The Combing Of The Hair Of Rasoolullah

translation.text: “I used to comb the hair of Allah’s Messenger (Allah bless him and give him peace) while I was menstruating.”

“Allah’s Messenger (Allah bless him and give him peace) made a frequent practice of oiling his head and combing his beard, and he often wore the head veil, so it was as if his
robe was the robe of an oil dealer.”

“Allah’s Messenger (Allah bless him and give him peace) used to love tayammun  in his ritual purification when
he purified himself, in his combing when he combed his hair, and putting on his shoes when he donned them.”
"Allah’s Messenger (Allah bless him and give him peace) forbade combing except at intervals.”
"The Prophet (Allah bless him and give him peace) used to comb his hair at intervals.”
translation.narrator: Humaid ibn 'Abd ar-Rahman relates on the authority of a man from among the Companions of the Prophet (Allah bless him and give him peace):

chapter.title: The Combing Of The Hair Of Rasoolullah
